title: The Century Report: March 13 2026
description:
AI safety lines harden as grids unlock hidden capacity.

The Pentagon's chief technology officer argued that Claude's safety architecture "pollutes" the military supply chain - on the same day a Defense Department official disclosed that generative AI chatbots are already being used to rank and prioritize military strike targets as a conversational layer on live intelligence feeds. This edition also covers Humanity's Last Exam, a 2,500-question benchmark engineered so that any question current AI could answer was removed before release, with the most capable models today scoring below 50%; Virginia's unanimous 96-0 passage of balcony solar legislation classifying panels as consumer appliances; PJM's adoption of ambient-adjusted transmission ratings unlocking 15% to 40% more capacity from existing infrastructure; and University of Geneva researchers publishing D-cysteine findings in Nature Metabolism showing a mirror-image amino acid that shuts down tumor metabolism through a transporter found only on cancer cell surfaces.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-13-2026/
